GG0170E5 Mobility: Chair/Bed to Chair Transfer Ability (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Chair/bed-to-chair transfer: The ability to transfer to and from a bed to a chair (or wheelchair). effective 10/01/2019
764 GG0170F5_TOILT_INTRIM_CD GG0170F5_TOILT_INTRIM_CD GG0170F5 Mobility: Toilet Transfer (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Toilet transfer: The ability to get on and off a toilet or commode. effective 10/01/2019
765 GG0170I5_WLK_10_INTRIM_CD GG0170I5_WLK_10_INTRIM_CD GG0170I5 Mobility: Walk 10 Feet (Interim Perf)
